title: From Base Model to Assistant
concept: Retrace the path: pretraining learns language structure (Base model) -> SFT teaches task format -> RLHF aligns values and safety (Instruct model).

exercises.prompt: What is a raw Base Model trained to do during its first stage (pretraining) stage?

options.text: Predicting the next word in a sentence

exercises.explain: Before it becomes an assistant, a base model's only job is to guess what word comes next in a sentence.

cards.title: From Predictor to Helper
cards.body: AI assistants like ChatGPT don't start out helpful or polite. They begin as wild text predictors that just guess the next word. How do we turn them into friendly helpers? Let's trace the journey!

cards.title: The Three-Step Recipe
cards.body: Creating an AI assistant has three stages: Pretraining builds a 'Base Model' that understands grammar and facts. Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) teaches it to answer questions. Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) makes it safe and polite.

cards.title: The Service Dog Journey
cards.body: Imagine training a service dog. Pretraining is like letting a puppy grow up and explore the world to learn what things are (base model). Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) is teaching the dog to 'sit', 'stay', and 'fetch' on command. Finally, RLHF is teaching the dog to do these tasks gently without chewing up your shoes!

cards.title: Base vs. Instruct in Action
cards.body: If you type 'Write a story about a cat' to a Base Model, it might just repeat 'Write a story about a dog' because it is only matching patterns. If you ask an Instruct Model (which completed SFT and RLHF), it will actually write the cat story for you!

cards.title: Myth: AI is Born Helpful
cards.body: Many people think AI models are born ready to chat. In reality, a raw 'Base' model is terrible at conversations! It needs special formatting training (SFT) and safety training (RLHF) before it is safe to release to the public.

cards.title: Before and After Training
cards.body: Let's compare a raw Base Model with an Instruct Model that has gone through SFT and RLHF.

right.text: Answers your question directly, politely, and safely.

left.text: Predicts the next word. Might just repeat your question or random web text.

exercises.prompt: What is the main goal of Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT)?

options.text: It teaches the model all human languages.
It teaches the model how to follow instructions and answer prompts.
It connects the model to the live internet.
It shrinks the model's file size.

exercises.explain: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) teaches the model the question-and-answer format so it acts like an assistant instead of just completing random sentences.

exercises.prompt: True or False: A raw Base Model is always ready to act as a safe and helpful conversational partner.
exercises.explain: A base model is only trained to predict the next word on web text, so it often just continues the text instead of answering your question.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing step that aligns the model's behavior with human values.
exercises.sentence: Pretraining builds the base model, SFT teaches the response format, and [blank] makes the assistant safe and helpful.
exercises.explain: RLHF uses human feedback to align the AI's answers with human values, ensuring it is safe, polite, and helpful.

exercises.prompt: Which response comes from an aligned AI Assistant (Instruct model) answering the prompt: 'Why do leaves change color?'

options.text: Why do leaves change color in autumn? It is a popular question asked by children during the fall season.
Why do leaves change color? Leaves change color because of science and trees. Next slide please.
Leaves change color because trees stop making green chlorophyll as the weather gets colder, revealing yellow and orange colors.

exercises.explain: Option C is the AI because it directly answers the prompt in a helpful assistant format. Options A and B just continue the text like a base model predicting patterns.

exercises.prompt: What is the correct order of stages to transform a raw AI model into a helpful, safe assistant?
exercises.explain: Pretraining builds a base model that predicts words. SFT teaches the model to answer prompts instead of just extending them. RLHF refines the model to ensure its answers are safe, helpful, and polite.
